_comment: Ordered concatenation manifest for scripts/bundle-css.mjs. Paths are relative to src/saola/. Order is load-bearing: all widgets share @layer saola.components so later rules win on equal specificity. Ordering rationale: base → atomic/standalone → form elements → containers → overlays/portals → composites that depend on earlier widgets (popover before dropdown_menu/command, dialog before drawer/sheet, toast before toaster combinator). Components in subdirectories use their full relative path. Charts are a separate group (saola.charts layer).
